name: referencias-app
description: Gerenciamento bibliográfico para doutorado — monorepo full-stack

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.android:release: npm run build:android && npm run android:bundle && npm run android:assemble
